stories.title: 纽约州长用 AI 分析每一条法规，同时暂停新 AI 数据中心建设
stories.sourceTitle: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
stories.summary: 纽约州长 Kathy Hochul 透露其团队正使用 AI 分析州内所有法规，并已签署暂停新建 AI 数据中心的法令。此举引发对政府 AI 使用与监管平衡的讨论。
stories.analysis: AI 在政府治理中应用加速，但监管与新建限制的张力值得持续关注。
stories.sourceExcerpt: New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself. During an interview with Bloomberg's Odd Lots podcast, Hochul said that her team is using "AI to analyze

stories.title: OpenAI 为青少年打造安全 ChatGPT：年龄保护、学习工具和家长控制
stories.sourceTitle: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
stories.summary: OpenAI 宣布新增针对青少年的安全措施，包括年龄适宜的保护、学习工具、家长控制及专家合作，旨在让青少年安全使用 AI。
stories.analysis: 此举可能为 AI 在教育领域的合规应用树立新标准。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.

stories.title: Moonshot 即将发布 Kimi K3，2万亿-3万亿参数，有望缩小与 Anthropic Opus 4.8 差距
stories.sourceTitle: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
stories.summary: 据报道，Moonshot 的新模型 Kimi K3 参数规模在2万亿至3万亿之间，将成为中国最大的开放 AI 模型，目标接近 Anthropic Opus 4.8 水平。
stories.analysis: 中国开源大模型参数竞赛再升级，性能对标西方顶尖模型。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

stories.title: Google Vids 新增 AI 化身：用户可“出演”自己的 AI 视频
stories.sourceTitle: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
stories.summary: Google 在 Vids 中引入个性化 AI 化身，用户可用数字版自己创作视频，同时 Gemini Omni 支持通过提示和参考图生成编辑视频。
stories.analysis: AI 视频创作从辅助工具向“数字替身”演进，可能重塑内容生产流程。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

stories.title: Roblox 移动端上线 AI 游戏创建功能：输入一句话即可生成基础游戏
stories.sourceTitle: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
stories.summary: Roblox 推出“Build”功能，用户只需一个文本提示就能在移动端生成基础游戏，降低游戏创作门槛。
stories.analysis: AI 生成式创作正在渗透 UGC 平台，Roblox 此举可能带动用户创作量激增。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

stories.title: Google 将 NotebookLM 更名为 Gemini Notebook，保持独立应用并深度整合 Gemini
stories.sourceTitle: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
stories.summary: Google 宣布 AI 笔记应用 NotebookLM 更名为 Gemini Notebook，仍为独立应用，但将与 Gemini 和 Google 搜索更深度整合。
stories.analysis: 品牌统一化，但独立运行表明 Google 对笔记场景的长期投入。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini

stories.title: 计算机警察：得克萨斯州 Fort Worth 的“数字时代警务”大会现场直击
stories.sourceTitle: Computer cops
stories.summary: 记者在 Fort Worth 体验了一场被标榜为“数字时代警务未来”的大型活动，但被禁止进入主会场，引发对 AI 执法透明度的疑问。
stories.analysis: AI 在警务领域的应用日益受关注，但封闭性可能损害公众信任。
stories.sourceExcerpt: I stood before a hulking glass and brick structure in the heart of Fort Worth, Texas. Thousands gathered inside to see what had been billed as "the future of policing in the digital age." As press, I was prohibited from entering, but from a number of nearby lo

stories.title: Google AI Mode 更新：可安全关联并操作更多常用应用
stories.sourceTitle: Connect more of your apps to Search
stories.summary: Google AI Mode 新增功能，用户可以直接在 AI 模式中安全地关联和操作常用服务，拓展 AI 交互边界。
stories.analysis: 从问答到任务执行，AI 作为“应用中枢”的潜力显现。
stories.sourceExcerpt: You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode.

stories.title: Google Vids 两项更新：Gemini Omni 和个性化化身让视频创作更简单
stories.sourceTitle: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
stories.summary: Google Vids 引入 Gemini Omni 和个性化化身功能，用户可更轻松地创建、编辑和出演视频。
stories.analysis: 视频创作门槛进一步降低，AI 化身可能成为新交互形态。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.

stories.title: Google AI Mode 扩展：可链接并操作特定应用完成任务
stories.sourceTitle: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
stories.summary: Google AI Mode 最新更新允许用户将 AI 模式与常用应用链接，从回答问题扩展到跨应用完成任务。
stories.analysis: AI 从信息检索向自动化工作流演进，应用场景更广阔。
stories.sourceExcerpt: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

stories.title: DoorDash 推出命令行工具 dd-cli：开发者与 AI 代理可直接下单
stories.sourceTitle: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
stories.summary: DoorDash 开放 dd-cli 命令行工具有限测试，开发者及 AI 代理可通过终端搜索商店、构建购物车并下单，标志着软件向 AI 代理友好设计迈进。
stories.analysis: AI 代理驱动的外卖订购成为现实，未来更多服务将原生支持 AI 交互。
stories.sourceExcerpt: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

stories.title: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT 篮球：硬件试水还是品牌营销？
stories.sourceTitle: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
stories.summary: OpenAI 本周发布了首个硬件产品——ChatGPT 篮球，引发市场对其硬件战略的猜测。
stories.analysis: 硬件新品可能意在拓展品牌影响力，而非核心业务转向。
stories.sourceExcerpt: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

stories.title: Claude 集成 1Password：可调用用户密码完成多步骤操作
stories.sourceTitle: Claude can now use your 1Password credentials for you
stories.summary: 1Password 为 Claude 推出浏览器集成，授权后 Claude 可直接访问存储的凭证，辅助完成多步骤任务。
stories.analysis: AI 与密码管理器打通，提升自动化能力，但安全边界需谨慎。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 1Password has launched a new browser integration for Claude that allows the Anthropic chatbot to access stored security credentials like usernames and passwords. The 1Password for Claude feature means that users can authorize Claude to complete multi-step task

stories.title: 前 DeepMind 研究员 Andrew Dai 以 3 亿美元种子前估值融资，押注视觉 AI
stories.sourceTitle: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
stories.summary: 前 DeepMind 研究员 Andrew Dai 凭借多年 AI 系统构建经验，在未发布产品前以 3 亿美元估值完成种子前轮融资，他认为视觉 AI 是下一重要前沿。
stories.analysis: 顶级研究员的高估值融资，表明资本对视觉 AI 领域的高度期待。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major frontiers in artificial

stories.title: AMI Labs CEO 拒绝使用‘AGI’或‘超级智能’标签，专注世界模型
stories.sourceTitle: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
stories.summary: Yann LeCun 的世界模型初创公司 AMI Labs CEO Alexandre LeBrun 表示，他不追逐“超级智能”概念，而是专注于实际的世界模型构建。
stories.analysis: 务实态度在当前 AI 热潮中显得独特，可能更注重可落地成果。
stories.sourceExcerpt: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.

stories.title: 欧盟命令 Google 向竞争对手开放 Android 和搜索，影响 AI 助手市场
stories.sourceTitle: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
stories.summary: 欧盟裁定 Google 必须让竞争对手的 AI 助手和搜索引擎更易访问 Android 和搜索核心部分，可能削弱 Google 垄断地位。
stories.analysis: 反垄断裁决将重塑欧洲 AI 助手生态，竞争格局生变。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weak

stories.title: Apple Intelligence 获准在中国上线，合作方为阿里巴巴和百度
stories.sourceTitle: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
stories.summary: Apple Intelligence 经过审批，将在华与阿里巴巴、百度合作推出，此举对 Apple 在华 AI 战略至关重要。
stories.analysis: 落地中国关键市场，本土化合作是必然选择。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

stories.title: xAI 起诉用户利用 Grok 生成儿童性虐待深度伪造内容
stories.sourceTitle: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
stories.summary: xAI 对南卡罗来纳州一名男子提起诉讼，指控其故意使用 Grok 生成儿童性虐待材料，这是 xAI 首次因滥用而采取法律行动。
stories.analysis: AI 公司积极追责滥用行为，或成为行业应对安全问题的范例。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Gr

stories.title: AI 低质电影成为新“直接发行”赚快钱的模式
stories.sourceTitle: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
stories.summary: 报道指出，AI 生成的低质量电影正模仿当年直接发行视频的模式，旨在快速获利，而非追求艺术品质。
stories.analysis: AI 内容泛滥风险加剧，平台审核和行业标准面临挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between $80-$100 million in just a few days. People are clearly excited to

stories.title: 数据泄露揭示 Suno 从 YouTube、Genius 和 Deezer 抓取数百万首歌曲训练模型
stories.sourceTitle: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
stories.summary: 黑客泄露的数据显示，AI 音乐生成器 Suno 在未公开情况下从 YouTube Music、Deezer 和 Genius 等平台抓取数百万首歌曲和歌词用于训练。
stories.analysis: 版权争议再起，AI 训练数据合规性成焦点。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revea

stories.title: Cars24 借助 OpenAI 语音和聊天代理处理每月超百万分钟对话，挽回 12% 流失线索
stories.sourceTitle: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
stories.summary: 二手车平台 Cars24 使用 OpenAI 驱动的语音和聊天代理，每月处理超过 100 万分钟对话，挽回 12% 的流失潜在客户。
stories.analysis: AI 客服在垂直行业的高效落地案例，ROI 明确。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.

stories.title: Deutsche Telekom 与 OpenAI 合作，从客服到网络运营全面重塑电信业务
stories.sourceTitle: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: Deutsche Telekom 正借助 OpenAI 转型为 AI 原生电信公司，涉及客服、员工工作流、网络运营及未来语音。
stories.analysis: 电信巨头全面拥抱 AI，或成为行业数字化转型标杆。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

stories.title: OpenAI 与 Walton Family Foundation 合作，为 K-12 教师提供 AI 技能工作坊
stories.sourceTitle: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
stories.summary: OpenAI Academy 与 Walton Family Foundation 推出 AI Skills Jams 项目，帮助 K-12 教育工作者掌握实用的 AI 课堂技能。
stories.analysis: AI 教育普及从教师培训入手，有利于构建可持续的 AI 素养生态。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

stories.title: 三菱日联金融集团与 OpenAI 推进 AI 原生组织转型
stories.sourceTitle: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
stories.summary: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建 AI-native 组织，改进内部工作流，并推出新的 AI 驱动的金融服务。
stories.analysis: 大型金融机构全面引入 AI，有望提升运营效率和客户体验。
stories.sourceExcerpt: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

stories.title: OpenAI 详解 GeneBench-Pro：生命科学领域的新评测基准
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Genebench-Pro
stories.summary: OpenAI 介绍 GeneBench-Pro，一个用于评估 AI 在生命科学中表现的基准，旨在推动 AI 在基因和蛋白质分析中的应用。
stories.analysis: 专业基准的发布有助于标准化生命科学 AI 能力的评估。

stories.title: OpenAI 工程师通过大规模核心转储分析修复 18 年历史的基础设施漏洞
stories.sourceTitle: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
stories.summary: OpenAI 团队利用大规模 core dump 分析，找出并修复了一个同时涉及硬件缺陷和长期软件 bug 的罕见崩溃问题。
stories.analysis: 复杂的调试案例展示了 AI 基础设施维护的挑战与创新方法。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

stories.title: 理想 L6 换代 24.98 万开卖：标配 L9 同款自研芯片和中控屏，一个版本满配不涨价
stories.sourceTitle: 理想L6换代24.98万开卖！L9同款自研芯片中控屏下放，一个版本配置拉满不涨价
stories.summary: 理想汽车推出 L6 换代车型，售价 24.98 万元起，下放 L9 同款自研芯片与中控屏，全系配置拉满且不涨价，最快下周一提车。
stories.analysis: 传统车企智能化升级加速，自研芯片下沉至更低价位车型将重塑市场竞争格局。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 最快下周一提车

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：首个通义系列实时安全护栏模型，保护 Token 流安全
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen 团队发布 Qwen3Guard，基于 Qwen3 微调的安全分类模型，可实时过滤 Token 流中的不安全内容。
stories.analysis: 安全护栏模型的推出表明国产大模型在合规方面的主动布局。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
